function.name: mailcli_sync
function.description: Fetch recent messages from the mail account and write them to the local index. Call this before searching or threading to ensure the index is up to date.

limit.description: Max messages to sync (default: 10, 0 = no limit)

since.description: Only sync messages on or after this RFC3339 timestamp

before.description: Only sync messages before this RFC3339 timestamp

refresh.description: Re-fetch messages already in the index

function.name: mailcli_list
function.description: List message metadata directly from the mail server (no local index required). Returns id, from, subject, date for each message.

function.name: mailcli_get
function.description: Fetch and parse a single message by ID. Returns the full StandardMessage including body, attachments, extracted codes and action links.

id.description: Message-ID (<abc@example.com>), IMAP UID (uid:42), or sequence number (42)

function.name: mailcli_search
function.description: Full-text search across the local indexed messages. Returns matching messages ranked by relevance. Run mailcli_sync first to populate the index.

query.description: Search terms (searches subject, body, from, to)

full.description: Return full message content (default: compact summary)

function.name: mailcli_threads
function.description: List email thread summaries from the local index. Each thread groups related messages and includes aggregated category, action types, and participant info.

action.description: Filter by action type (e.g. confirm, verify, track)

has_codes.description: Only return threads with extracted verification codes

function.name: mailcli_thread
function.description: Return all messages belonging to a specific email thread from the local index.

function.name: mailcli_send
function.description: Send a new email via SMTP. Returns the generated Message-ID on success.

body_md.description: Email body in Markdown (will be rendered to HTML + plain text)

body_text.description: Plain text body (used when body_md is absent)

function.name: mailcli_reply
function.description: Send a reply to an existing email thread. Sets In-Reply-To and References headers automatically.

reply_to_message_id.description: Message-ID of the message being replied to

references.description: Full reference chain from the original thread

function.name: mailcli_export
function.description: Export messages from the local index as JSONL (default), JSON array, or CSV. Useful for feeding large batches to LLMs or data pipelines.

function.name: mailcli_delete
function.description: Permanently delete a message from the remote mailbox by setting \Deleted and expunging.

id.description: Message-ID, IMAP UID (uid:42), or sequence number

function.name: mailcli_move
function.description: Move a message to another mailbox (copy + expunge original).

dest_mailbox.description: Destination mailbox name (e.g. Archive, Trash, Spam)

function.name: mailcli_mark
function.description: Mark a message as read or unread by setting/clearing the \Seen flag.

unread.description: Set to true to mark as unread (default: false = mark as read)
